heading_content_part: Privacy Policy | handyCloset Inc.handyCloset Inc.Privacy PolicyWe (handyCloset Inc.) respect the privacy of everyone using it. Please check the following regarding the use of information in the latest version.[

processing of the photos is done only inside your device.Our apps do not send your photos to the outside of your device.Our apps do not collect face data and do not send them to the outside of your device. Our apps never share them with third parties.[

provision to third parties, please check the following page.http://www.google.com/intl/en/policies/technologies/ads/https://policies.google.com/privacyAd distributors may use cookies and ad IDs to display ads.It is possible to limit acquisition of information by the following method.<Android>Launch "Settings" app -> Check "Google" -> "Ads" -> "Opt ou

t of Ads Personalization"<iPhone, iPad, iPod>Launch "Settings" app -> "Privacy" -> "Advertising" -> "Limit Ad Tracking" On[Analyze]Some of our apps are using Firebase Analytics and Firebase Crashlytics in order to analyze problems and improve the apps. We don't use them  for other purposes. Please check the following page for the information, purpose of use, provision to third parties etc. that Google's service obtains.https://policies.google.com/privacy[Use in EEA]

In order to comply with the European General Data Protection Rule (GDPR), in the case that an application being distributed in the store of the European Economic Area (EEA) judges that it is being used within the EEA by the Google AdMob Consent Library,  You can choose whether to display personalized or non-personalized ads, and you can choose whether to permit analysis with Firebase Analytics and Crashlytics.[Temporary Files]

Temporary files of photos for "Undo", "Redo", "Resume" and so on may be saved in the storage area of the application.These files will not be sent to the outside the apps.These files will be deleted from the device when the app is deleted.[Support Pages]The linked "Support Pages" are created on Google's service. Please check the following page for the information, purpose of use, provision to third parties etc. that Google's service obtains.https://policies.google.com/technologies/partner-sites

https://policies.google.com/privacy[Mail]When sending e-mail to us, e-mail address, title, text, etc. are acquired, but these are the same as ordinary e-mail.
